compiled_state.title: RED test: Add fragile severity tests to test-record-review.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Modify tests/hooks/test-record-review.sh to add RED test cases for fragile severity:
1. Submit a review with a fragile finding and expect STATUS=failed (min_score=3, which is < 4)
2. Verify fragile is accepted in valid_severities without error

Test approach: Create a mock reviewer-findings.json with severity fragile, invoke record-review.sh, assert STATUS=failed in output and no severity validation error.

Tests must FAIL (RED) against the current record-review.sh because fragile is not in valid_severities.

## File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-record-review.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 1 new test function for fragile
  Verify: grep -c 'fragile' tests/hooks/test-record-review.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 1)}'
- [ ] New fragile test fails RED against current record-review.sh
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-review.sh 2>&1 | grep -q FAIL

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — Files: tests/hooks/test-record-review.sh. Tests: 2 RED tests written, confirmed failing.
comments.author: Test
